svg.text: Occlusion And Overlap Review
Kine Pose Dev V3 Phase A QA evidence. Not final preview.
pose_00 beat: screen-left boot supports; screen-right knee lifts toward viewer
occlusion: frontOwner: screen_right_leg; backOwner: torso_core; risk: hip_or_thigh_hole, frontOwner: swinging_arm; backOwner: torso_edge; risk: black_sleeve_detach
